reviews.comment:
Deja mucho que desear el lugar, sucios los baños, moscas en el patio de comida

(Translated by Google)
The place leaves much to be desired; the bathrooms are dirty, and there are flies in the food court.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtcHYzLU5BEAE

reviews.comment:
Baños limpios y amplios , cuenta con tienda donde se puede comprar snak, bebidas, dulces, golosinas, etc. También cafeteria. Se puede recargar agua caliente en las máquinas por $10. Es una buena opción para detenerse en un largo viaje.

(Translated by Google)
Clean and spacious restrooms; there's a shop where you can buy snacks, drinks, candy, sweets, etc. There's also a cafeteria. You can refill your hot water at the machines for $10. It's a good option for a stop on a long trip.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtcHZDRVp3EAE

reviews.comment:
Exelente .lugar agradables..para el mste..calentar agua y picar slgo..

(Translated by Google)
Excellent. Nice place..to have a meal..heat water and have a snack..

reviews.comment:
Un excelente parador para descansar en el viaje

(Translated by Google)
An excellent rest stop on your journey
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtNnFmbjFBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Para mi una parada casi obligada. Siempre bien atendido. Limpio prolijo y con variedad de productos y servicio

(Translated by Google)
For me, it's almost a must-stop. Always well-served. Clean and tidy, with a variety of products and service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtNnFlSXJBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Completo centro de servicios para el viajero. Ideal para detenerse a cargar combustible en el viaje a la costa  y no tener que cargar en el destino balneario, dónde suele ser más alta la demanda.

(Translated by Google)
A comprehensive service center for travelers. Ideal for stopping to refuel on the way to the coast, avoiding having to refuel at the resort, where demand is usually highest.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtNnZYRjZnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para descansar, comer e ir a los sanitarios. Todo de diez. Muy amables!!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to rest, eat, and use the restrooms. Everything was perfect. Very friendly!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtcXR5ZFlREAE

reviews.comment:
Muy bien la higiene de los baños, el autoestima servicio los precios eran caros, el servicio de playa fue cordial y las calles de ingreso e egreso un poco descuidadas.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were very clean, the service was respectful, the prices were expensive, the beach service was friendly, and the entrance and exit roads were a bit neglected.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtcXJEbVBREAE
